expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: skill improvements for report-editor do not regress a different feature planning flow
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly states the case focus and evaluates it: result.md says the benchmark checks that “skill improvements made for the `report-editor` feature family do not regress a different feature planning flow” and concludes it is “not explicitly covered” / “cannot be demonstrated as satisfied” due to missing runtime artifacts.

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md explicitly align to holdout as the primary checkpoint: execution_notes.md: “Primary phase under test is **holdout**… minimum artifact… at the holdout regression checkpoint”; result.md: “Primary checkpoint: **holdout** (blocking)” and provides a holdout-phase PASS/FAIL verdict.
